# Cosimo by Medici & Company

> Fund operations infrastructure for private equity, venture, credit, and real estate funds. LP reports, K-1 packages, due diligence memos, and rent roll extractions — source-cited and audit-ready.

## Product
- Cosimo processes fund documents and produces deliverables that used to take teams weeks.
- Every number is traceable. Every deliverable is ready for audit.
- Each client runs on a fully segregated instance.

## Use Cases
- Due Diligence: 1,200 documents processed in 2 hours vs. 2 weeks manual
- K-1 Packages: Days reduced to hours, validated against source documents
- LP Reporting: 30-second query response with source document citations
- Portfolio Monitoring: Real-time covenant compliance across all entities

## Pilot Program
- 30-minute discovery call
- 1–2 week onboarding on a dedicated instance
- 4–6 month live pilot with real documents on real deadlines
- No lock-in

## Contact
- Email: info@medici.ai
- Website: https://cosimo.work
